initiatives.name: Reproductive Freedom Fund of New Hampshire
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization providing mutual aid and support for abortion access across New Hampshire. They coordinate direct financial assistance, practical support, and solidarity networks while building power through reproductive justice organizing and creating pathways for healthcare access and bodily autonomy.

initiatives.name: Insubordination Station
initiatives.description: registered Syringe Service Program providing harm reduction supplies and community education in New Hampshire.

initiatives.name: 603 Equality
initiatives.description: 603 Equality is a community driven, statewide organization that works to connect, educate, and advocate for LGBTQ+ people across NH.

initiatives.name: NH Mutual Aid Relief Fund
initiatives.description: The NH Mutual Aid Relief Fund is a grassroots effort of working-class people who believe that direct action and solidarity are the best ways to meet the material and social needs of our community.

initiatives.name: NH Trans Action
initiatives.description: Building a movement to fight for trans rights in New Hampshire.
